title: Report-only Route Decision
description: Implement report-only Route Decision support for human, ignore, and daily-triage-report routes through the activated Roadmap-Sliced Development chain.

1.label: Report-only Route Decision
1.notes: Feature slice verification before commit: npm run test:route-decision, npm run test:activation-contract, and npm run test:issue-fix-request passed. Activation carrier issue #21 contains slash command, activation request, activation Route Decision, and activation consumed comments. Report-only local dogfood decisions are recorded in docs/testing/report-only-route-decision-e2e.md.

decisions.q: 下一个 Route Decision 实现范围是什么？
decisions.answer: 实现 report-only Route Decision，覆盖 human、ignore、daily-triage-report 三条基础控制面路线。
decisions.note: Report-only route 只产生 Route Decision 与 report evidence；不得创建 Issue Fix Request、Activation Request、workflow dispatch 或 consumer implementation work。

1-2.label: Report-only dispatcher implementation
1-2.notes: Implemented scripts/report-only-route-dispatcher.mjs. It reads the real route table, supports human/ignore/daily-triage-report report-only routes, emits Route Decision plus report evidence, and explicitly creates no side-effect requests.

1-3.label: Replayable verification for report-only routes

decisions.q: Report-only Route Decision 的完成状态是什么？
decisions.answer: Allowed report-only Route Decision 使用 status: closed。
decisions.note: Report-only route 没有后续 request lifecycle；report evidence 生成后即闭环，使用 pending 会误导后续 agent 继续等待 consumer。

1-3.notes: Verification gate: npm run test:route-decision passed, including report-only route matching, kind drift denial, non-matching denial, and existing side-effect route replay coverage.

1-4.label: ZAgenticLoop report-only route dogfood
1-4.notes: Dogfood gate: ran scripts/report-only-route-dispatcher.mjs against real zj-loop/zj-loop-route-table.yaml for human, ignore, and daily-triage-report synthetic signals linked to issue #21. Decisions: rd_report_37f23ba8d291, rd_report_608d990bd18f, rd_report_8a9f213d1057.
